title: anthemis cretica subsp. argaea
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. argaea, also known as a type of mountain daisy or Greek mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. argaea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
